data.title: Capital Group ceases to be substantial shareholder in Megaport
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Megaport ( (AU:MP1) ) has issued an update.

Megaport has disclosed that The Capital Group Companies and its related investment management entities have ceased to be substantial shareholders in the company as of 7 April 2026. The change follows on-market disposals of Megaport common stock by Capital Research and Management Company, which reduced the group’s voting power below the substantial holding threshold and signals a notable shift in the company’s institutional investor base.

The filing clarifies that Capital Group and its affiliates do not hold Megaport shares for their own account but manage them on behalf of client portfolios, meaning the exit primarily reflects portfolio management decisions for those clients. The reduction in a major institutional stake may affect perceptions of Megaport’s share register composition and could influence market sentiment around the stock, even though it does not directly alter the company’s operations or strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MP1) stock is a Hold with a A$7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Megaport stock, see the AU:MP1 Stock Forecast page.

More about Megaport

Megaport Ltd. operates in the network connectivity and cloud services sector, providing elastic interconnection services that link enterprises to cloud providers, data centres, and network services globally. The company targets businesses seeking flexible, on-demand connectivity to support cloud adoption and digital transformation strategies.

Average Trading Volume: 1,232,845

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$1.26B

For a thorough assessment of MP1 stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Nanosonics Limited ( (AU:NAN) ).

Nanosonics Limited, a healthcare technology firm listed on the ASX under code NAN, develops and supplies infection prevention solutions used in medical and clinical environments. Its ordinary fully paid shares form the basis of the company’s capital structure and are the subject of an ongoing on-market share buy-back.

The company reported that, as part of its on-market buy-back program first notified in December 2025, it has repurchased a total of 4,244,162 shares prior to the latest trading day, with a further 150,000 shares bought back on the previous day. The continued daily execution of the buy-back indicates active capital management, which can support earnings per share and may signal confidence in the company’s valuation to investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NAN) stock is a Buy with a A$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nanosonics Limited stock, see the AU:NAN Stock Forecast page.

Nanosonics Limited is an Australian-listed company trading under the ASX code NAN, with ordinary fully paid shares on issue. The company operates in the healthcare technology sector, focusing on infection prevention solutions for medical environments and related clinical settings.

An announcement from Rakon ( (NZ:RAK) ) is now available.

Bourns, Inc. has lifted its relevant interest in Rakon to 80.359% of the company’s ordinary shares, up from 78.972%, after additional shareholders accepted its ongoing full cash takeover offer. The increase, driven by the acquisition of a further 3.19 million shares at $1.55 per share under the offer, strengthens Bourns’ control position in Rakon and signals growing shareholder support for the transaction, further consolidating ownership and potentially paving the way for greater strategic influence over the New Zealand company’s future direction.

More about Rakon

Rakon Limited is a New Zealand-based technology company whose shares trade on the NZX under the ticker RAK. data.title: Talent Infinity Showcases High-Grade Potential at Buster Antimony-Gold Project in B.C.
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Talent Infinity Resource Developments, Inc. ( (TSE:TICO) ) just unveiled an update.

Talent Infinity Resource Developments Inc. has outlined key geological and historical exploration highlights for its 1,092-hectare Buster Antimony-Gold Project in the Clinton Mining Division of British Columbia. The project hosts a structurally controlled epithermal gold-antimony system within early Cretaceous sedimentary rocks intruded by quartz-feldspar porphyry, with mineralization associated with fault zones and intrusive contacts.

Historical work at Buster has returned high-grade gold intercepts from diamond drilling and trench samples, alongside strong antimony and pathfinder element anomalies that define multiple target zones over a kilometre-scale footprint. Management views the acquisition as a strategic addition that broadens its critical minerals portfolio in a mining-friendly jurisdiction, potentially enhancing its growth pipeline, though it cautions that historic results have not yet been verified by its Qualified Person and may not be indicative of future outcomes.

Spark’s Take on TICO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TICO is a Underperform.

TSE:TICO currently faces significant financial and operational challenges, with zero revenue, substantial losses, and high financial leverage. Technical indicators are weak, and the lack of valuation metrics adds to the risk profile. However, recent corporate events, including executive changes and strategic advisories, provide a glimmer of potential improvement. Overall, the stock is high-risk with limited immediate upside potential.

To see Spark’s full report on TICO stock, click here.

More about Talent Infinity Resource Developments, Inc.

Talent Infinity Resource Developments Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring and developing critical mineral properties in mining-friendly jurisdictions. The company is listed on the CSE under the symbol TICO and on the FSE under the symbol 0N8, targeting assets with exposure to key strategic metals such as antimony and gold.

data.title: Waraba Gold Raises $4.5 Million in Upsized Private Placement to Advance Ivory Coast Exploration
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Waraba Gold Limited ( (TSE:WBGD) ) has issued an announcement.

Waraba Gold Limited has closed an upsized non-brokered private placement, issuing 15 million units at $0.30 per unit to raise $4.5 million, above its original $4 million target. Each unit comprises one common share and one warrant exercisable at $0.45 until April 2028, with all securities subject to a standard four-month-plus-one-day hold period.

The company plans to use the proceeds to fund commitments under its Ivory Coast exploration earn-in arrangements and for general working capital, bolstering its financial position for ongoing projects. Several directors and officers participated in the financing, triggering related-party transaction rules, but Waraba relied on exemptions from formal valuation and minority approval as insider participation remained below 25% of its market capitalization.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:WBGD) stock is a Hold with a C$0.57 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Waraba Gold Limited stock, see the TSE:WBGD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WBGD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WBGD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial fundamentals (no revenue, large losses, sustained cash burn, and negative equity with rising debt). Technical indicators are notably stronger and provide support in the near term, but valuation is still challenged by ongoing losses and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on WBGD stock, click here.

Cathedra Bitcoin Inc ( (TSE:CBIT) ) just unveiled an update.

Cathedra Bitcoin Inc., a North American power and digital infrastructure operator serving the bitcoin mining sector, runs four data centers in Tennessee and Kentucky with 45 megawatts of capacity and operates its own high-performance mining fleet. The Vancouver-based company’s shares trade on the TSX Venture Exchange and the OTC market under the symbols CBIT and CBTTF, respectively.

Cathedra has signed a new hosting agreement that will use 80% of the 15-megawatt capacity at its Shire site in Kentucky, representing about a quarter of its total hosting capacity and reinforcing its off-peak energy strategy. The deal broadens its customer base, bolsters recurring revenue, and positions the company more strongly as it moves toward a planned business combination with Sphere 3D Corp., aimed at creating a larger, high-density computing power infrastructure player in North America.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CBIT) stock is a Sell with a C$0.26 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cathedra Bitcoin Inc stock, see the TSE:CBIT Stock Forecast page.

On April 8, 2026, Tecogen Inc. extended the term of its Advisory Agreement with long-time adviser John N. The extension, approved unanimously by the company’s board on April 7, 2026, underscores the board’s ongoing reliance on Hatsopoulos’s counsel, signaling continuity in strategic guidance and corporate oversight for stakeholders.

The decision to prolong the Advisory Agreement may help maintain stability in Tecogen’s leadership structure at a time when consistent advisory input can be critical to navigating operational and market challenges. For shareholders and other stakeholders, the move suggests the board values long-term advisory relationships as a component of the company’s governance framework and strategic positioning.

Aehr Test Systems ( (AEHR) ) has shared an update.

On April 8, 2026, Aehr Test Systems entered into an equity distribution agreement with William Blair & Company and Craig-Hallum Capital Group to offer and sell up to $60 million of its common stock through an at-the-market program under an effective shelf registration. The arrangement allows the agents to sell shares on Nasdaq and other markets or in privately negotiated deals, with Aehr retaining discretion over timing and size of sales, paying up to a 3% commission, and preserving flexibility to suspend or terminate the program, providing a scalable mechanism to raise capital as needed without committing to a fixed issuance size.

data.title: Strategic Resources Gains Frankfurt Listing to Tap European Demand for Critical Minerals
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Strategic Resources ( (TSE:SR) ).

Strategic Resources Inc., a developer of high-purity iron, vanadium and titanium projects in Canada and Finland, has secured a listing for its common shares on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the ticker “UI8N,” while maintaining its primary listing on the TSX Venture Exchange in Canada. Trading in Frankfurt will be conducted in euros, and the company’s regulatory filings will continue to be governed by Canadian securities laws.

The Frankfurt listing responds to growing European investor interest in critical minerals and is intended to broaden Strategic’s access to European capital, improve share liquidity and raise its profile among institutional and retail investors across the EU. Management sees Europe’s leadership in the energy transition as a key demand driver and expects the new listing to support advancement of its flagship BlackRock Project in Quebec and the Mustavaara mine in Finland.

More about Strategic Resources

Strategic Resources Inc. is a Montreal-based critical mineral development company focused on high-purity iron, vanadium and titanium, metals viewed as essential to decarbonizing the global economy. Its key assets include the construction-ready BlackRock Project in Quebec, which plans a 4‑million‑tonne‑per‑year high‑purity iron ore pellet plant at Port Saguenay, and the previously operated Mustavaara mine in Finland.

Average Trading Volume: 19,412

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$13.41M
